steps.title: Determine each segment type's contribution
steps.content: With $x$ segments of 1 minute each, we get $x$ minutes. With $y$ segments of 3 minutes each, we get $3y$ minutes.

steps.title: Write the total equation
steps.content:
The sum of all segments equals the 70-minute video:
$$x + 3y = 70$$
That matches choice D — D is correct.
